subject: Hi Jeffrey xxx
body:
Hi Jeffrey

How are you?

I hope you're doing well. I just wanted to say I'm sorry for all this media bullshit you have had to deal with.

I know how the media lie, and I know you. 

I think it is disgusting the way they have blown things completely out of proportion.

You have been a very positive influence in my life - I often think back on the times I spent with you and they were really some of the best times of my life. You taught me so much and knowing you changed my life and made me much more aware than I ever could have been - I  am eternally grateful for that.

I have wanted to send an email for some time, I just want you to know I am 100% behind you and am very sorry that you have had to go through this. You must just remember that most people are very ignorant and thrive on lies.

I miss you a lot and I really hope you're doing well. Ignore everyone and just focus on feeling positive and good as you always do. Don't let them get you down - you really are such an amazing person and I think it is very wrong.

I have been doing very well and have my own online business now, I even have 3 full time employees! I work from home and import everything from HK. I also started modeling again recently - I attached pics for you to see :)

I'm going to be in NY from 17-27 September and would love to see if you're around.

I really hope everything that happened hasn't caused you too much stress - don't listen to idiots and rather focus on feeling good and doing well!

I will always love you as a friend and I'm always here for you anytime.

Again I'm sorry you've had stress but always remember that you are so much better than all those people.

I love you Jeffrey! You will always be one of the most important people in my life. 

Hope to see you when I'm there.

Lots of love

Xxx














Sent from my iPhone
